ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the facility's location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the facility's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the facility */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the facility */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the facility based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "reply" TEXT /* Reply from the facility */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of facility (e.g., Gym, Sports Club) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Personal Training, Group Classes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service offered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the service */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_services_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility admin */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility managed by the admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for admin communication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for admin authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_admins_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the facility */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility that has been favorited */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with the social media account */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the social media account */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility hosting the event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
column_names: Contact phone number of the facility
